GUI.item.name.set.lore.de-DE:
[grey][gem_purple][ROUNDDOT] Lege den [gem_purple]Namen deines [era_purple]Clans fest!

[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Der Name darf [gem_purple]mindestens 3 und [gem_purple]höchstens 16 Zeichen lang sein!
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Erlaubte Zeichen: [gem_purple]A-Z, a-z, 0-9

[green]Du hast den Namen bereits gesetzt!
GUI.item.name.set.lore.en-US:
[grey][gem_purple][ROUNDDOT] Set the [gem_purple]name of your [era_purple]clan!

[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] The name must be at least [gem_purple]3 and at most [gem_purple]16 characters long!
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Allowed characters: [gem_purple]A-Z, a-z, 0-9

[green]You have already set the name!

GUI.item.name.lore.de-DE:
[grey][gem_purple][ROUNDDOT] Lege den [gem_purple]Namen deines [era_purple]Clans fest!

[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Der Name darf [gem_purple]mindestens 3 und [gem_purple]höchstens 16 Zeichen lang sein!

GUI.item.name.lore.en-US:

GUI.item.tag.set.lore.de-DE:
[grey][gem_purple][ROUNDDOT] Lege den [gem_purple]Tag deines [era_purple]Clans fest!

[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Der Tag darf [gem_purple]mindestens 2 und [gem_purple]höchstens 5 Zeichen lang sein!
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Erlaubte Zeichen: [gem_purple]A-Z, a-z, 0-9
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Zur [gem_purple]Kolorierung deines Tags kannst du moderne [gem_purple]MiniMessages oder das alte [gem_purple]Legacy Formatting benutzen!
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Für mehr [gem_purple]Informationen zu der Kolorierung kannst du folgenden Link in deinem Browser öffnen: [gem_purple]go.eramc.net/color-formatting-de

[green]Du hast den Tag bereits gesetzt!
GUI.item.tag.set.lore.en-US:
[grey][gem_purple][ROUNDDOT] Set the [gem_purple]tag of your [era_purple]clan!

[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] The tag must be at least [gem_purple]2 and at most [gem_purple]5 characters long!
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Allowed characters: [gem_purple]A-Z, a-z, 0-9
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] For the [gem_purple]coloring of your tag you can use modern [gem_purple]MiniMessages or the old [gem_purple]Legacy Formatting!
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] For more [gem_purple]information about the coloring you can open the following link in your browser: [gem_purple]go.eramc.net/color-formatting-en

[green]You have already set the tag!

GUI.item.tagline.set.lore.de-DE:
[grey][gem_purple][ROUNDDOT] Lege die [gem_purple]Tagline deines [era_purple]Clans fest!

[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Die Tagline darf [gem_purple]mindestens 3 und [gem_purple]höchstens 8 Zeichen lang sein!
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Erlaubte Zeichen: [gem_purple]A-Z, a-z, 0-9

[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Die [gem_purple]Tagline deines Clans wird hinter dem Namen von [gem_purple]Mitgliedern angezeigt und soll den Clan besser beschreiben.
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Beispiele für eine [gem_purple]Tagline könnten sein [gem_purple]#RICH, [gem_purple]#Tryhard oder [gem_purple]#GOAT

[green]Du hast die Tagline bereits gesetzt!
GUI.item.tagline.set.lore.en-US:
[grey][gem_purple][ROUNDDOT] Set the [gem_purple]tagline of your [era_purple]clan!

[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] The tagline must be at least [gem_purple]3 and at most [gem_purple]8 characters long!
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Allowed characters: [gem_purple]A-Z, a-z, 0-9

[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] The [gem_purple]tagline of your clan is displayed behind the name of [gem_purple]members and should describe the clan better.
[grey][gem_purple][ARROW] Examples for a [gem_purple]tagline could be [gem_purple]#RICH, [gem_purple]#Tryhard or [gem_purple]#GOAT

[green]You have already set the tagline!

GUI.item.confirm.lore.de-DE:
[grey][gem_purple][ROUNDDOT] Klicke hier, um die Erstellung deines [era_purple]Clans abzuschließen!

[grey][darker_red]Achtung: Nach der Bestätigung kannst du den Namen deines Clans nicht mehr ändern!
GUI.item.confirm.lore.en-US:
[grey][gem_purple][ROUNDDOT] Click here to complete the creation of your [era_purple]clan!

[grey][darker_red]Warning: After confirming you won't be able to change the name of your clan anymore!
